title: get list papers returns all loaded papers
description: Verify that GET /api/lemma?action=listPapers returns a 200 status with an array of AcademicPaper objects representing all loaded syllabus materials.

title: post create paper adds new paper with valid data
description: Verify that POST /api/lemma with action=createPaper and valid paper data returns 200 with the created paper object, and subsequent GET /api/lemma?action=listPapers includes the new paper.

title: post create paper rejects invalid paper data
description: Verify that POST /api/lemma with action=createPaper and invalid or incomplete paper data returns an error response and does not add the paper to the library.

title: post ask doubt returns answer for valid question
description: Verify that POST /api/lemma with action=askDoubt and a valid question tied to a loaded paper returns 200 with an answer or grounding response.

title: post ask doubt handles invalid or unsupported questions
description: Verify that POST /api/lemma with action=askDoubt and an invalid or unsupported question returns an error response or fallback message.

title: post generate study materials returns summary for loaded paper
description: Verify that POST /api/lemma with action=generateStudyMaterials for a loaded paper returns 200 with generated summary content.

title: post generate study materials errors on missing or unsupported paper
description: Verify that POST /api/lemma with action=generateStudyMaterials for a missing paperId or unsupported paper returns an error response and no summary is generated.

title: get list flashcards returns flashcards for valid paper
description: Verify that GET /api/lemma?action=listFlashcards&paperId={paperId} returns 200 with an array of Flashcard objects for the specified paper.

title: post rate flashcard records valid difficulty rating
description: Verify that POST /api/lemma with action=rateFlashcard and a valid difficulty rating payload returns 200 confirming the rating is recorded.

title: post rate flashcard rejects invalid rating payload
description: Verify that POST /api/lemma with action=rateFlashcard and an invalid flashcard rating payload returns an error response and does not record the rating.
